T1.description: Analyze issue #433 and perform 5xWhy root cause analysis

rca.problem: PR #457 showed merge issues (mergeStateStatus: UNSTABLE) — two CI checks were IN_PROGRESS: 'System tests (E2E)' and 'preview'
rca.why1: Why was the PR unstable? Because two CI checks had not completed when the PR was opened.
rca.why2: Why had they not completed? Because GitHub Actions E2E and NodeJS Frontend Preview workflows take 3-6 minutes to run and were still in progress.
rca.why3: Why is that a 'merge issue'? The mergeStateStatus=UNSTABLE blocks auto-merge and signals to reviewers that CI is not green yet.
rca.why4: Why did the underlying issue (#433) cause 18s LCP? Because subprocess.run() in opencode_database_agent_cli.py had no timeout and every AgentSelector mount triggered a fresh subprocess call with no caching.
rca.why5: Why was there no caching or timeout? The agent listing code was written without considering performance implications of slow CLI startup times (~18s for opencode CLI).
rca.root_cause: The CI checks were simply still running when the PR was created — no code defect. The fix (caching + timeout + async handlers) was already implemented in PR #457.

evidence: gh pr view 457 --json mergeStateStatus,mergeable => {mergeStateStatus: UNSTABLE, mergeable: MERGEABLE}
gh pr checks 457 => System tests (E2E): pending, preview: pending (all others: pass)

T2.description: Plan the fix — confirm PR #457 already contains the correct implementation
plan: Verify PR branch fix/issue-433-agents-api-cache-timeout contains all required changes
Confirm changes: timeout=30 in subprocess.run(), in-memory cache with 60s TTL in agent_service.py, async route handlers in app.py
Confirm unit tests cover: cache hit, cache miss, separate cache per repo, timeout expiry
Wait for CI to complete and all checks to pass
evidence: git log --oneline main..fix/issue-433-agents-api-cache-timeout => 2 commits ahead: cf789d8 Archive investigation, 74893db Fix: agents API endpoint 18s block
gh pr view 457 body => all required file changes documented

T3.description: Implementation already complete in PR #457 — verified no additional changes needed
evidence: packages/pybackend/app.py => route handlers converted to async def

T4.description: Commit and push — branch already pushed to origin
evidence: git status => On branch fix/issue-433-agents-api-cache-timeout, nothing to commit, working tree clean
git log --oneline => cf789d8 Archive investigation artifact for issue #433 (latest)

T5.description: Observe CI and iterate until all checks pass
evidence: Python Backend Tests with Coverage: pass (29s)
Quality Assurance (Lint + Format + Unit Tests): pass (39s)
